headline: Comcast’s Xfinity and Adobe Co-innovate on Deep Brand Intelligence for Marketing Campaigns
summary: LAS VEGAS, April 21, 2026--Today at Adobe Summit — the flagship customer experience conference — Adobe (Nasdaq: ADBE) announced a new partnership with Xfinity, Comcast’s consumer brand delivering WiFi, mobile, entertainment, and home services to millions of customers across the U.S. The partnership will help accelerate on‑brand creative campaign production to help scale customized marketing messaging with improved efficiency.

headline: Comcast Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: CMCSA heads into Q1 earnings with revenue growth expected but profit under pressure amid broadband losses, rising costs and heavy sports-driven spending.

raw.headline: Comcast Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
raw.summary: CMCSA heads into Q1 earnings with revenue growth expected but profit under pressure amid broadband losses, rising costs and heavy sports-driven spending.

headline: Reliable, High-Speed Internet from Xfinity Coming to Three Additional Cities in Missouri
summary: BLUE SPRINGS, Mo., April 21, 2026--Comcast is connecting more than 4,200 new homes and businesses in Adrian, Archie and Butler, Missouri to multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network. Xfinity brings Internet, mobile, entertainment, and smart home services into one simple, seamless solution – giving customers more speed, savings, and control over their connected lives. These three Missouri cities now join nearly 65 million homes and businesses

headline: Morgan Stanley Initiates Comcast (CMCSA) with Equal Weight, Sees Limited Near-Term Upside
summary: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) is included among the 12 High Dividend Stocks Picked by Billionaire Ray Dalio. On April 16, Morgan Stanley assumed coverage of Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) with an Equal Weight rating. It also set a $31 price target on the stock. The firm said the current valuation looks “attractive,” but does not see a […]
